description:
You are a security engineer who has just rotated a shared credential.  
  Before you check-in the new secret to the password-vault, you must record a very small performance benchmark that shows how long it takes to create the new hash.  
  For audit purposes, this benchmark must be stored in a single, plain-text log file whose format the compliance scripts can automatically parse.

  What you have to do
  1. Create a new directory called  
     /home/user/credential_rotation
  2. Inside that directory create a file named  
     /home/user/credential_rotation/benchmark.log
  3. The log file must contain exactly **one** line, terminated with a normal Unix newline (LF).  
     The line must be in the following comma-separated key=value format (no spaces anywhere):

        hash=<64 lowercase hexadecimal characters>,algo=sha256,elapsed_ms=<positive integer>,notes="rotation successful"

     • hash is the SHA-256 digest (in lowercase hexadecimal) of the literal string rotateMe2024  
       – Remember: the digest must be calculated over the ASCII bytes r o t a t e M e 2 0 2 4 with **no** trailing newline.  
     • algo must literally be sha256  
     • elapsed_ms is the number of whole milliseconds it took to compute the hash; any positive integer is acceptable  
     • notes must literally be "rotation successful" including the quotation marks

  4. Complete the entire task with a **single** terminal command (i.e. one command line, though you may use subshells, pipelines, or command substitution inside it).

  Verification
  The automated grader will check that:

  • /home/user/credential_rotation exists and is a directory  
  • /home/user/credential_rotation/benchmark.log exists and is a regular file  
  • benchmark.log contains exactly one line that matches  
    hash=[0-9a-f]{64},algo=sha256,elapsed_ms=[1-9][0-9]*,notes="rotation successful"\n

  If any of those checks fail the task is considered incomplete.  No other files need to be created or modified.
truth:
The grader will use the following regular expression to validate the single line inside /home/user/credential_rotation/benchmark.log:

  ^hash=[0-9a-f]{64},algo=sha256,elapsed_ms=[1-9][0-9]*,notes="rotation successful"$

  The directory /home/user/credential_rotation does not exist before the task starts; the agent must create it.  
  benchmark.log must be a text file ending with a single LF (Unix newline).
